_comment: Merge lanes for obot-merge, per repo. 'allowed': base branches mergeable once Jeremy has approved the work (contract-gated, no extra attestation). 'approvalRequired': protected/release branches - mergeable ONLY with Jeremy's explicit in-session approval, attested via --jeremy-approved '<note>' (obot-merge posts the note as an audit comment on the PR before merging). Repos absent from this file are refused entirely. Tiers approved by @jwildfire 2026-07-22; gsm.safety added to the standard tier same day per the obot.roadmap#18 design review (branch model adopted in gsm.safety#44). Changing this file changes the guardrail - do not edit without Jeremy's sign-off.
